stemHtml: A warm front is approaching the destination aerodrome at approximately the same time the aircraft will make its approach. In addition to rain and low cloud, the following conditions could be expected:

options.a: Although visibility may reduce before the front arrives, it will NOT reduce below 1 000 metres.
options.b: Fog may be encountered, clearing only slowly after the front passes.
options.c: A narrow band of shallow fog, clearing as soon as the front passes.
options.d: Patches of fog, but these will only form after the front has passed.
